item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description: - Refreshed the download page and README with cleaner Macsimize product copy, badge-style top links, architecture-aware downloads, improved Homebrew copy interactions, and a support CTA that matches the site styling. - Tightened the Settings window so it fits the content better and improved manual update checks so the UI no longer sits on `Checking for updates...` indefinitely. - Fixed title-bar hit testing so Dock icon double-clicks and other off-window clicks no longer get misclassified as title-bar maximize actions.
